name: IndiGo SBI Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under IndiGo SBI Card terms
milestoneBenefits: 2,500 IndiGo BluChips on annual spends of Rs 2 lakh
2,500 IndiGo BluChips on annual spends of Rs 4 lakh
2,500 IndiGo BluChips on annual spends of Rs 6 lakh
2,500 IndiGo BluChips as renewal benefit after annual fee payment
additionalBenefits: 2,500 IndiGo BluChips as welcome benefit after joining fee payment and first transaction within 60 days
3 IndiGo BluChips per Rs 100 on IndiGo app and website spends
2 IndiGo BluChips per Rs 100 on hotel, lodging and select travel MCC spends
1 IndiGo BluChip per Rs 100 on other eligible spends
IndiGo BluChips can be redeemed on IndiGo website or app against IndiGo flights and other eligible activities
4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, capped at 1 per quarter, subject to Rs 50,000 spend in the previous quarter
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel spends from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 200 per month
